metadata.title: Aparthotel Arenal | Furnished Studios in Pals, Costa Brava
metadata.description: Stay in our fully equipped studios in the heart of Pals, Costa Brava. Steps away from golf courses and beaches. Book directly for the best rate.

home.heroTitle: Your retreat on the Costa Brava
home.heroSubtitle: Furnished studios in the heart of Pals, between golf and the Mediterranean
home.storyText: Three friends, a café, and over twenty years of history. The Arenal is a place to live before it is a place to stay. The ground-floor café has seen friendships born, projects launched, sunny mornings enjoyed. The studios came later, built above, as a natural extension of that welcoming spirit.
home.studiosText: Five independent studios, fully equipped, with private terraces and views of the medieval village of Pals or the Montgrí massif.
home.environmentText: Pals lies at the heart of the Empordà, between the wild beaches of the Mediterranean and some of Spain's most renowned golf courses.
home.bookingText: Book directly on our website and enjoy the best guaranteed rate, with no intermediary commission.

story.title: Our story
story.subtitle: The Arenal Café and its studios
story.block1Text: Over twenty years ago, three friends decided to create a place in their own image in Pals, the medieval village perched at the heart of the Empordà. The Arenal Café was born from this simple desire: a place where time slows down, where coffee is enjoyed in the sun, where every day feels a bit like a holiday.
story.block2Text: Years passed, and the café became a landmark for regulars and passing travellers alike. Naturally, the studios were built above, as an extension of that welcoming spirit. Five independent apartments, designed to offer the comfort of home with the freedom of an independent stay.
story.block3Text: Today, the Arenal is all of this at once. A lively café, warm studios, an anchor point on the Costa Brava. Every morning, guests come down for breakfast at the bar. In the evening, they gather for a drink. This simplicity is what defines the identity of the place.
story.eventsCta: The café lives all year round
story.eventsText: The Arenal Café hosts events every month: music nights, village festivals, tastings and Catalan traditions. The calendar changes with the seasons, but the atmosphere stays the same.

studios.title: Our studios
studios.subtitle: Five independent apartments in the heart of Pals

booking.guaranteeText: By booking directly on our website, you get the lowest price with no intermediary commission.

environment.title: Surroundings
environment.subtitle: Pals and the Empordà, between land and sea
environment.intro: Located in the heart of the Costa Brava, Pals offers a unique setting between preserved beaches, golf courses and medieval heritage.
environment.golfText: The Golf de Pals, founded in 1966, is one of the most renowned courses on the Costa Brava. Five minutes' drive from the Arenal.
environment.beachesText: Pals beach stretches for several kilometres of fine sand bordered by dunes and Mediterranean pine forests.
environment.villageText: The historic centre of Pals, with its cobbled streets and Romanesque tower, is one of the best preserved in Catalonia.

golf.title: Golf in Pals
golf.subtitle: Exceptional courses on the Costa Brava
golf.intro: Pals is a prime destination for golfers. Two top-tier courses lie just minutes from the Arenal.
golf.palsGolfDesc: Founded in 1966, Golf de Pals is an 18-hole, par 73 course known for its technical layout through umbrella pines. It hosts international competitions each year.
golf.empordaGolfDesc: Golf d'Empordà offers two 18-hole courses designed by architects von Hagge and Baird, in an exceptional setting facing the Montgrí mountains.

beaches.title: Pals beaches
beaches.subtitle: Fine sand and turquoise waters of the Mediterranean
beaches.intro: The coast around Pals offers some of the finest beaches on the Costa Brava, preserved and easily accessible.
beaches.platjaPalsDesc: A long stretch of fine sand bordered by natural dunes and pine groves. Ideal for families and water sports enthusiasts.
beaches.saRieraDesc: A small cove with wild charm, bordered by cliffs and Mediterranean vegetation. A more intimate spot for swimming.
beaches.illesFormiguesDesc: This archipelago off Palafrugell offers exceptional diving spots, accessible by boat from the neighbouring coves.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are here to help

contact.formSuccess: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Furnished studios and café in the heart of Pals, Costa Brava

events.title: Our events
events.subtitle: The Arenal Café calendar
events.intro: The Arenal Café lives to the rhythm of the seasons. Every month, Nuria and her team organise events that bring together guests, village locals and passing travellers. Here is what awaits you throughout the year.
events.ctaText: Events have been part of the Arenal's soul for over twenty years.

january.name: Calçotada evenings
january.description: The Catalan tradition of fire-grilled calçots, served with homemade romesco sauce. A convivial evening to kick off the year.

february.name: Pals Carnival
february.description: The café joins in the village carnival with entertainment, music and costumes. The festive atmosphere takes over the terrace.

march.name: Musical spring
march.description: Acoustic evening concerts to celebrate the return of warmer days. Guitar, jazz and local voices in the intimate setting of the café.

april.name: Easter week
april.description: Special Easter brunch and family activities. The mona de Pascua, the traditional Catalan Easter cake, takes centre stage.

may.name: Fira de Pals
may.description: The café joins the village's annual fair. Tastings of local produce, Empordà crafts and guaranteed good cheer.

june.name: Sant Joan
june.description: The night of Sant Joan, the most magical of the year in Catalonia. The café hosts its own verbena with music, coca de Sant Joan and bonfires.

july.name: Summer nights
july.description: Late-night tapas and cocktails on the terrace. Weekend DJ sets and a guaranteed Mediterranean atmosphere.

august.name: Festa Major de Pals
august.description: The village's big festival, with concerts, sardanes, correfocs and street entertainment. The café becomes the hub of the festivities.

september.name: Harvest and gastronomy
september.description: Wine tasting from the Empordà and a special seasonal menu. The café celebrates the grape harvest with local winemakers.

october.name: Castanyada
october.description: The Catalan All Saints' tradition: roasted chestnuts, panellets and muscatel. The café dresses in its autumn colours.

november.name: Literary evenings
november.description: Book club and meetings with local authors. The café returns to its cosy atmosphere for evenings by the fire.

december.name: Christmas markets
december.description: The café hosts a small artisan Christmas market. Mulled wine, handmade gifts and a festive atmosphere to end the year in style.
